DD_ACTION_EXECUTION_ID.description: AWS CodePipeline action execution ID (used as CI job identifier for correlation).

DD_CIVISIBILITY_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_PRO.description: Name of the CI Visibility auto-instrumentation tool that injected dd-trace (telemetry only).

DD_CIVISIBILITY_DANGEROUSLY_FORCE_COVERA.description: Force-enable CI Visibility behavior for testing or debugging.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_DANGEROUSLY_FORCE_TEST_S.description: Force-enable CI Visibility behavior for testing or debugging.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_RUM_FLUSH_WAIT_MILLIS.description: Wait time in milliseconds before flushing CI Visibility RUM events.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_TEST_COMMAND.description: Command used to run the test suite in CI Visibility.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_TEST_MODULE_ID.description: CI Visibility test module identifier used to correlate spans across worker processes.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_TEST_SESSION_ID.description: CI Visibility test session trace identifier used to correlate spans across worker processes.

DD_GIT_COMMIT_HEAD_SHA.description: Git commit SHA for git metadata collection.

DD_GIT_PULL_REQUEST_BASE_BRANCH.description: Git base branch information for pull requests.

DD_GIT_PULL_REQUEST_BASE_BRANCH_SHA.description: Git commit SHA for git metadata collection.

DD_SITE.description: Datadog site/region to send data to. Set this when your org is not on `datadoghq.com`.

DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ATTEMPT_TO_FIX_RETRIE.description: Number of retries used by Test Management.

evidence.snippet:
!isFalse(getEnv('DD_TEST_FAILED_TEST_REPLAY_ENABLED')))
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isServiceUserProvided', !!this.#env.service)
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isTestManagementEnabled', !isFalse(getEnv('DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ENABLED')))
      calc.testManagementAttemptToFixRetries = maybeInt(getEnv('DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ATTEMPT_TO_FIX_RETRIES')) ?? 20
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isImpactedTestsEnabled',
        !isFalse(getEnv('DD_CIVISIBILITY_IMPACTED_TESTS_DETECTION_ENABLED')))
    }

calc.url = DD_CIVISIBILITY_AGENTLESS_URL
      ? new URL(DD_CIVISIBILITY_AGENTLESS_URL)
      : getAgentUrl(this._getTraceAgentUrl(), this.#optionsArg)

    if (this.#isCiVisibility()) {
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isEarlyFlakeDetectionEnabled',
        getEnv('DD_CIVISIBILITY_EARLY_FLAKE_DETECTION_ENABLED') ?? true)
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isFlakyTestRetriesEnabled', getEnv('DD_CIVISIBILITY_FLAKY_RETRY_ENABLED') ?? true)
      calc.flakyTestRetriesCount = maybeInt(getEnv('DD_CIVISIBILITY_FLAKY_RETRY_COUNT')) ?? 5
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isIntelligentTestRunnerEnabled', isTrue(this.#isCiVisibilityItrEnabled()))
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isManualApiEnabled', !isFalse(getEnv('DD_CIVISIBILITY_MANUAL_API_ENABLED')))
      this.#setString(calc, 'ciVisibilityTestSessionName', getEnv('DD_TEST_SESSION_NAME'))
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'ciVisAgentlessLogSubmissionEnabled',
        isTrue(getEnv('DD_AGENTLESS_LOG_SUBMISSION_ENABLED')))
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isTestDynamicInstrumentationEnabled',
        !isFalse(getEnv('DD_TEST_FAILED_TEST_REPLAY_ENABLED')))
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isServiceUserProvided', !!this.#env.service)
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isTestManagementEnabled', !isFalse(getEnv('DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ENABLED')))
      calc.testManagementAttemptToFixRetries = maybeInt(getEnv('DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ATTEMPT_TO_FIX_RETRIES')) ?? 20
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'isImpactedTestsEnabled',
        !isFalse(getEnv('DD_CIVISIBILITY_IMPACTED_TESTS_DETECTION_ENABLED')))
    }

    // Disable log injection when OTEL logs are enabled
    // OTEL logs and DD log injection are mutually exclusive
    if (this.#env.otelLogsEnabled) {
      this.#setBoolean(calc, 'logInjection', false)
    }

    calc['dogstatsd.hostname'] = this.#getHostname()

    // Compute OTLP logs and metrics URLs to send payloads to the active Datadog Agent
    const agentHostname = this.#getHostname()
    calc.otelLogsUrl = `http://${agentHostname}:${DEFAULT_OTLP_PORT}`
    calc.otelMetricsUrl = `http://${agentHostname}:${DEFAULT_OTLP_PORT}/v1/metrics`
    calc.otelUrl = `http://${agentHostname}:${DEFAULT_OTLP_PORT}`

this._stringBytes = new MsgpackChunk()
    this._writer = writer
    this._reset()
    this._debugEncoding = isTrue(getValueFromEnvSources('DD_TRACE_ENCODING_DEBUG'))
    this._config = this._writer?._config
  }
